title: Parties and Recitals
text: This Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of {{effective_date}} by and between {{party_1_descriptor}} ("Party 1") and {{party_2_descriptor}} ("Party 2") (collectively, the "Parties"). WHEREAS, the Parties desire to enter into this Agreement for a lawful purpose and lawful consideration under the Indian Contract Act, 1872; NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual covenants and promises set forth herein, and other good and valuable consideration, the receipt and sufficiency of which are hereby acknowledged, the Parties agree as follows:
name: Parties, Recitals and Execution Date
source: Indian Contract Act, 1872; Indian Evidence Act, 1872

jurisdiction_constraints.Maharashtra: Stamp paper value must comply with Maharashtra Stamp Act 1958 Schedule I
jurisdiction_constraints.Karnataka: Karnataka Stamp Act 1957 governs applicable stamp duty

dispute_hotspots: Vague party descriptions leading to questions of contract privity
Unsigned or partially signed agreements — ICA S.10 enforceability challenge
Wrong effective date — impacts limitation period calculation
